title: The report oil companies are worried about: Climate attribution science
summary: And then there’s the issue that, by the very nature of the field, it’s looking at rare and extreme events. “The increasing likelihood of interactions between hazards across space and time is leading to more compounding, cascading, and record-breaking events,” the report…
